findings.body: src/state/agent-observability.ts validates only projection_boundary plus hardcoded work_item and stage checks; drive trace, span, correlation, operation kind, outcome, and failure validation from the policy object.
validateAgentObservability does not fail when no trace files are present; add an empty trace-directory refusal before span-level checks.
docs/work/BANDIT-053/brief.md acceptance criterion overclaims validator coverage unless validateAgentObservability enforces the listed required fields.
readTraces lets missing docs/agent-observability raise raw ENOENT instead of the module's friendly Missing <path> error.
